blended.narrative: Whiteface is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 7,315 ft. Looking ahead, 27 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 44°F.

Saturday: 5" of snow, highs of 14°F. Expect powder.
Sunday: 4" of snow, highs of 20°F. Expect powder.
